name: Schifferdecker Golf Course
about: Schifferdecker Golf Course is Joplin's only public 18-hole course, offering an enjoyable experience for all skill levels. The venue is recognized as the most popular golf course in the area, featuring a par 71 course open year-round on historic Route 66. A state-of-the-art golf simulator was added in 2017, providing players the opportunity to play world-renowned courses with the comfort and convenience of being indoors. The facility includes a stocked pro shop and a clubhouse where guests can enjoy drinks and snacks.
why_golfers_like_it: Indoor simulator access to world-renowned courses
Comfort and convenience of year-round play
Equipped with a stocked pro shop for all necessities
On-site clubhouse with food and drink options

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The pro shop is stocked with golfing necessities, but it's recommended to bring your own clubs for personal comfort and familiarity.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The clubhouse offers drinks and snacks for purchase, but outside food and drink policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: The golf simulator is reserved by the hour, but the time required for an 18-hole session is not specified.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly, with a 'Family of 4' annual pass option available and an environment suitable for all skill levels.
